programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: El primo de oro
programme.desc: An very rich, unknown cousin visits the family and spoils them. Of course, the family tries to take advantage.

programme.title: Don Camerino y Lucrecia
programme.desc: Ludovico tells his boss, Don Camerino, about his sister-in-law Lucretia, mistakenly thinking that he is looking for a wife. It turns out that he just wanted a prostitute.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Follows a dysfunctional family in Peluche City.

programme.title: La novia de Ludoviquito
programme.desc: Ludoviquito lleva a su novia a casa para presentarle a su familia, pero después terminan y su familia cree que se quiere suicidar.

programme.title: Brad Pittin
programme.desc: Federica se reencuentra con su exnovio de la preparatoria Nazario, quien es apodado como Brad Pittin por su parecido con el actor; y al ver que es rico y un exitoso escritor, Federica decide estar más tiempo con él.

programme.title: El video de las cochinadas
programme.desc: Ludoviquito quiere entrar a un concurso de los vídeos más estúpidos de la gente y sin querer se lleva un video de sus papás teniendo sexo, por lo que Ludovico y Federica tendrán que recuperar esa cinta.

programme.title: El concurso de reclamos
programme.desc: Ludovico insiste en que Lucrecia entre al "concurso de reclamos" que Federica ganó el año pasado. Don Camerino, al sentirse humillado, obliga a Ludovico a que lleve a su esposa para que Lucrecia no gane el concurso, mas no contaban con que Federica ya no quiere participar. Mientras que a Federica no puede participar en el concurso, ya que le cerraron la boca con el miedo de engordar, le ponen un cierre en la boca para no comer y manda a Ludovico a participar en el concurso disfrazado de Federica.

programme.title: Seminario de celosas
programme.desc: Federica va a un convento asistiendo a un seminario para controlar sus celos; Don Camerino le encarga a Ludovico ir por su sobrina Leonarda al aeropuerto y traerla al convento porque tiene problemas con el alcohol.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: La chica del feis
programme.desc: Pedro se dedica a buscar mujeres por Facebook, y ante el asombro de Luis, conoce a una chica guapísima; Luis tiene curiosidad y decide aplicar la misma técnica para encontrar al amor de su vida.

programme.title: Como en casa
programme.desc: Silvia, desesperada por conocer hombres, renta una habitación de su departamento por medio de una aplicación; un hombre apuesto renta el cuarto, ella se enamora, pero aparece la ex novia y comienzan los problemas.

programme.title: El simulacro
programme.desc: Un temblor llega a la ciudad sacudiendo todos los departamentos de los vecinos. Luis les propone a los vecinos llevar a una persona de Protección civil para prepararlos ante una emergencia.

programme.title: El origen
programme.desc: Morris está en la etapa de las dudas y pregunta a sus padres cómo conquistar al amor de su vida. Alejandra y Rocko deciden contarle una historia de amor: el relato de cómo se conocieron.

programme.title: Capítulo 125
programme.desc: Roberta asks Teo to forgive her. José blames Lupita for writing and sending out the anonymous letters.

programme.title: Capítulo 126
programme.desc: Giovanni, Mia, Roberta, Diego, Miguel, and Lupita decide to name their band Rebelde aka RBD. Lenny Kravitz gives Roberta his guitar at the Rollo Otro.

programme.title: Capítulo 127
programme.desc: Adal Ramones listens to the band sing and invites them on the show. RBD performs on the Otro Rollo show. Meanwhile, their closest friends prevent others students and their respective parents from watching the show. Gastón and Mia first meet.

programme.title: Capítulo 128
programme.desc: The new math teacher, Renata, refuses to help the kids with the schoolwork. Roberta and José mix up Hilda's first love and the important guest speaker; they lock Hilda and the speaker in a room together. Lupita tells Nico she has to go back to be with her sister.

programme.title: Capítulo 129
programme.desc: The band gets news that the recording label wants them to sing other songs and not their own. Alma goes on live TV to find Marcelino. Gastón has it out for Roberta for the mishap, however, she succeeds in getting Hilda and her first love face to face.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 131
programme.desc: Mia reflects on her and Miguel's precious moments. Diego decides to leave the band and Roberta is blamed for it. Alma decides to be the dance group's choreographer. Gastón calls Mia out of class, she cries about Miguel and he comforts her.

programme.title: Capítulo 132
programme.desc: Mia start a campaign/fundraiser to help save the Chapultepec Forest. Teo tells the Lodge that José was the one responsible for the anonymous letters out of fear and spite. Lupita decides to stay in school. Gastón gives Mia a present. Miguel becomes suspicious of Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 133
programme.desc: Diego tells his mom of his love for Paola; she asks to meet her. Gastón overhears José and Vico talking about him; he threatens José. Miguel is allowed access to Franco's files. Roberta tells Facundo not to let Diego into his band. León gets pictures of Paola with Diego.

programme.title: Capítulo 134
programme.desc: León threatens Paola on the phone and demands to speak to Diego. Mia distracts Gastón so the band won't be seen; he embraces her. Roberta tricks the principal to stop her mother from teaching choreography at the school. Mia gets mad at Miguel for telling the everyone that her and Gastón are dating.

programme.title: Las joyas de Magnolia
programme.desc: Jorge Luis refuses to accept the fortune that María Mercedes inherited; However, Malvina continues with her Machiavellian plans to keep the inheritance. Will she convince her son to accept it? On the other hand, Rodolfo finds out that Magnolia pawned her jewelry to help Guillermo, check out what she will tell him.

programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: No se peleen
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis fight over Borre's last taco and they stop talking. Vanesa leaves Benito in charge of a cat.

programme.title: El álbum
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis find a photo album in the garbage and through it they remember the best of the worst of the neighbors.

programme.title: Germán por un día
programme.desc: Germán gets sick and the neighbors decide to help him with the building work. Magdalena invents a trip to Paris to show off to her friend.

programme.title: Embarazo
programme.desc: Germán has the task of planting small trees that the mayor's office has given them. Someone in the building is pregnant.

programme.title: ¡Voy a ser papá!
programme.desc: Silvia le confiesa a Luis que está embarazada y él comienza a comprar muchas cosas para el bebé. Magdalena y su familia se vuelven ricos y comienzan a derrochar su dinero.

programme.title: La casa de las Lomas
programme.desc: Magdalena les dice a los vecinos que ella y su familia se mudarán a Las Lomas y le pide a Luis comprarle una mansión.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police question the legitimacy of the name a driver gives them; both husband and wife protect each other in a case of domestic violence; a 12-year friendship is jeopardized when a woman suspects her roommate of stealing.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman asks police to get involved after her ex threatened to destroy her home; prior medical procedures drive a woman to find a dangerous way to ease her pain; deputies search for a mysterious driver who fled a car crash.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies; a driver's assortment of containers raised some questions; a man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp; for one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems; deputies sympathize with a woman who's been put through the wringer.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man has a hard time making his case when a bag of illicit items has his name on it; a talkative driver tells officers a long story with conflicting details; a couple calls for help when they find an alligator in their yard.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail; sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels, deputies are on guard when they approach a belligerent man.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle at night is stopped for having no lights on it, but the deputy gets suspicious when the man begins to freak out; an officer sees two people pull up to a store in a car with no registration tags, then hurriedly walk away from it when they see him; a driver accuses another driver of threatening her with a gun.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A young couple allegedly spend too much time arguing instead of paying attention to the road; an officer uses a trick to catch someone in a lie; a chatty driver racks up a slew of charges in front of his own house.

programme.title: Over the Hill
programme.desc: A suspect in possession of a stolen truck leads everyone on a chase through some bumpy terrain; gas station employees call police when they spot a couple asleep at the pump; a man familiar to deputies shows them he can change.

programme.title: Hefty Amounts
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man's story; a cyclist throws something when cops roll up.

programme.title: Anger Management
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims his sack full of money is a gift from his grandma; the discovery of a pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect's story; a deputy attempts to get a man to cool off after a fight with his wife.

programme.title: Totaled Car Karma
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it's been in an accident; obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle; a young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: Say It, Don't Spray It
programme.desc: Two men acting strangely in a gas station draw the suspicion of an employee; deputies arrest a man for creating an unsafe environment for his younger brother; a mom calls the cops when her daughter throws water on her.

programme.title: Eat My Dust
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies; police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van; a confused man loses track of what's in his pockets.

programme.title: In Hot Water
programme.desc: A runaway biker makes multiple clumsy attempts to slip away from deputies; a shady figure has a curious method of trying to get a drink of water; a young woman starts making unwise choices when her family leaves town.

programme.title: Mr. Clean Getaway
programme.desc: A man in possession of a stolen car explains his unique nickname to deputies; police go to the same house twice in under 30 minutes to sort out a messy marital spat; a mom with multiple priors is caught in a bind.

programme.title: Get to the Point
programme.desc: A deputy tries to level with a man who has struggled with addiction for a decade; security guards at an aquarium warn officers about a man with a gun; a masked cyclist has no luck out-pedaling the officer on his tail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers, constables and sheriff's deputies patrol the streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Take a Ride With Me
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle; recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time; a neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Detectives untangle a jealous web after a man is shot in a home invasion.

programme.title: Lost Angel
programme.desc: A sister's murder puts detectives on the path of a killer driven by hatred.

programme.title: Death Mask
programme.desc: The police unveil a tale of obsession and violence in a mother's murder.

programme.title: Tears for My Mother
programme.desc: Detectives tirelessly gather evidence to find a killer with unchecked rage.

programme.title: The Slender Man
programme.desc: Detectives push to find a killer who is only described as a slender man.

programme.title: No Good Deed Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: What looks like a burglary gone bad may be something more personal.

programme.title: The Silencer
programme.desc: The police must decipher some odd evidence to identify a man's executioner.

programme.title: Hearts of Darkness
programme.desc: Detectives find rage and revenge while navigating a group of suspects.

programme.title: The Devil's Voice
programme.desc: A kidnapper taunts a family after he abducts and murders two girls.

programme.title: Deadlift
